title: Concentric per-ring A/B crossfade phase (L1)
goal: Concentric 12.67 dB. Ring GEOMETRY/SIZE/ORDER/rotation-timing all now CORRECT (structural fix shipped 3ac72b0+821ad0b). The Clone-A(src10008)/Clone-B(src10006) crossfade is Rig/timing-driven (no per-clone opacity). DO NOT re-attempt crop-on-mask-geometry (refuted, net -2.25). DoD: >=5 rings show woven phase, gate net-positive.
